strengths: Nearly 20 years of continuous software engineering across distributed systems, cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), full-stack product, and embedded/hardware — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum with demonstrated multi-domain depth.

Active hands-on contributor to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — direct, current experience at the frontier of applied AI tooling.

Founder and sustained maintainer of GISCollective (2016–present), an open-source event-driven geo-data platform serving NGOs and conservation scientists — evidence of the entrepreneurial, long-horizon product-builder mindset the role explicitly prizes.
concerns: Holds a BS in Computer Science and a Fine Arts bachelor's; no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, missing the preferred advanced-degree qualification.
AI expertise is concentrated in the current role (April 2025–present); the resume does not yet show a track record of large-scale AI platform design or AI strategy leadership at director-level scope.
No documented experience advising external strategic customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption — a named core responsibility with no clear analog in the career history.

key_factors.factor: Current applied AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
No AI strategy or external advisory track record

response.justification: Bogdan brings close to two decades of hands-on engineering spanning high-throughput microservices, cloud infrastructure, full-stack product development, and — most relevantly — active contribution to AI-agent frameworks and MCP tooling at the cutting edge of agentic AI, making him a genuine builder rather than a theoretical strategist. His founding of GISCollective demonstrates the entrepreneurial, product-ownership mindset the role values, and his history of community workshops, conference talks, and internal Refactoring Dojos maps directly to the expectation that the hire will inspire others internally and externally. The gaps in formal AI credentials and external advisory experience are real, but for an organization that weights cloud-and-AI builder fluency alongside strategy, his depth across stacks and current position at the frontier of agentic tooling provide a defensible path to the principal-engineer scope.
